evaluator: fresh independent Level 2 evaluator (Copilot CLI Chief)
summary: Full-epic F004 Level 2 close-out over merged main (slices S1-S6, latest merge 2c986a9). All four acceptance steps plus the cross-feature guardrails independently and adversarially verified against a live PostgreSQL stack on alternate ports. Offline gates (test.ps1 335/28, check.ps1 -NodeAudit 8/8) green; live stack healthy with migrations 0001..0006; stack-smoke 14/14; integration suite 28 passed; 101/101 independent adversarial probes across SSRF/adapters (45), DB immutability+separation (10), run_scan (18), reconciliation (23), and full migration round-trip (5). F004 flipped to passes:true.

acceptance_steps.name: contract_tests_every_source_type
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Run contract tests for every source type.
evidence: scripts/test.ps1 (offline) exit 0: pytest 335 passed / 28 skipped incl. all tests/ exercising ingest adapters and the 7-method SourceAdapter contract.
Live integration suite on fresh Postgres (DATABASE_URL=localhost:55432) exit 0: 28 passed.

Independent adapter probes (probe_offline.py) 45/45 PASS: reference (JsonOfferAdapter), RSS, HTML, structured-API, and MCP each produce candidate-only facts across unchanged/changed/malformed/partial/contradictory inputs; adapters reach the network ONLY through the injected Fetcher (grep confirms no direct http client import anywhere in app/ingest).
run_scan probes (probe_scan.py) 18/18 confirm every registered adapter type (ADAPTER_REGISTRY) is reachable through orchestration.

acceptance_steps.name: allowlists_blocking_limits_timeouts_malformed
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Verify official-domain allowlists, network blocking, limits, timeouts, and malformed-data handling.
evidence: Independent SSRF/guard probes against a LiveFetcher(enable_network=True) subclass with a stubbed _resolve: non-allowlisted host (DisallowedHostError), cross-host redirect, private/loopback IP, cloud-metadata 169.254.169.254 (incl. IPv4-mapped-IPv6 ::ffff: unmasking), non-https scheme, oversize body, request timeout, and bad MIME type ALL refused (BlockedAddressError/DisallowedHostError/etc.).
OfflineFetcher is the default and never opens a socket (NetworkDisabledError); LiveFetcher disabled unless enable_network=True; FixtureFetcher stays offline and still enforces scheme+host+MIME.

Deterministic JSON nesting-depth cap (MAX_JSON_NESTING_DEPTH=100 in adapters/_json.py) enforced by a pre-parse raw-text scan (_exceeds_max_depth) BEFORE json.loads; proven independent of sys.setrecursionlimit.

MCP capability allowlist enforced in BOTH directions with an injectable offline client: disallowed capability -> DisallowedCapabilityError with spy client call count == 0 (no real I/O); OfflineMcpClient default refuses live (McpDisabledError); host gate via shared FetchPolicy (DisallowedHostError).

Malformed data NEVER crashes and NEVER guesses: production adapters return rejected candidates in-adapter; the reference adapter (documented minimal demonstrator) raises on malformed input in isolation but run_scan wraps canonicalize()/extract() in a per-document try/except (scan.py:228-233) — proven end-to-end (probe_scan.py): malformed input -> errors=1, 0 candidates, 0 evidence, snapshot persisted, status=partial, no crash.

Residual R1 (full DNS-rebinding TOCTOU IP pinning) is a documented, accepted out-of-scope deferral (agent-state/progress.md S1 handoff + current_contract.json out_of_scope); addresses are re-resolved and re-checked per hop. Confirmed recorded, not a blocker.

acceptance_steps.name: unchanged_changed_stale_contradictory_fixtures
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Verify unchanged, changed, stale, and contradictory fixtures.
evidence: Independent reconciliation probes (probe_reconcile.py) 23/23 PASS: pure classifiers (assess_change/classify_materiality/assess_staleness/find_contradictions) cover unchanged, modified-material, modified-non-material, unknown, added, withdrawn, restored, staleness, and contradiction (unknown-never-conflicts, same-value, same-source, community-excluded); end-to-end reconcile_scan emits a DRAFT ChangeEvent on material change (publication_status='draft' on every event), flags stale, raises a pending ReviewItem (admin_disposition='pending') on contradiction that is NEVER auto-resolved, and creates ZERO OfferVersion.

run_scan probes 18/18: official source -> hashed Snapshot + pre-publication Candidate + Evidence linked Source/Snapshot/Candidate with offer_version_id NULL; reproducible content hashing; idempotent re-scan yields 0 changes and an identical hash.
Live integration suite covers the same unchanged/changed/stale/contradictory fixtures (28 passed).

acceptance_steps.name: community_cannot_become_verified_evidence
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Confirm community sources cannot become verified evidence.
evidence: run_scan on a community source produces a DiscoveryCandidate quarantine row plus a non-official Candidate (official=False) and ZERO evidence (probe_scan.py).

Independent raw-SQL DB probes (probe_db.py) 10/10 PASS at the DB layer: Trigger A trg_candidate_official_source rejects an official candidate on a community source; Trigger B trg_evidence_official_candidate rejects evidence referencing a community (non-official) candidate; attempted in-place community->official promotion rejected; all raise restrict_violation (SQLSTATE 23001 -> psycopg IntegrityError); a positive official-path control INSERT is allowed.
App layer raises SeparationError on the same crossings (tests/ separation suite), so the boundary holds at BOTH app and DB layers.
Migration 0006 (quarantine separation hardening) is reversible — verified in the full round-trip probe.

rubric_criteria.name: functional_correctness
rubric_criteria.evidence: All four acceptance steps verified end-to-end against a live stack plus 101/101 independent adversarial probes.

rubric_criteria.name: data_and_evidence_integrity
rubric_criteria.evidence: offer_version immutability trigger rejects UPDATE and DELETE (23001); evidence is official-only with offer_version_id NULL pre-publication; separation triggers A+B enforce official-only candidates/evidence; all verified adversarially via raw SQL.

rubric_criteria.name: zero_cost_safety
rubric_criteria.evidence: Ingestion produces candidate-only facts; NO publication path and NO OfferVersion writes anywhere; 'unknown is better than guessed' upheld (malformed -> errors, never a guessed candidate).

rubric_criteria.name: security_privacy
rubric_criteria.evidence: Safe-fetch SSRF guard refuses non-allowlisted/redirect/private-IP/metadata/non-https/oversize/timeout/bad-MIME; adapters reach network only via injected Fetcher; MCP capability allowlist enforced both directions offline; detect-secrets/pip-audit/npm-audit green.

rubric_criteria.name: portability
rubric_criteria.evidence: stdlib-only ingestion; no new runtime/npm dependency (dependency manifest diff vs origin/main empty; requirements-sync gate green).

rubric_criteria.name: product_truth_no_unsupported_claims
rubric_criteria.evidence: Ingestion never auto-publishes; community sources are quarantined and can never become verified evidence; no real-service free/Z0 claim introduced.

rubric_criteria.name: regression_safety
rubric_criteria.evidence: scripts/test.ps1 335/28, scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit 8/8, live stack-up/stack-smoke(14/14)/stack-down all green; migrations 0001..0006 reversible with zero drift; F000-F003 baselines unaffected.

command_results.adversarial_probe_db: exit 0; probe_db.py 10/10 PASS (offer_version UPDATE+DELETE rejected; 3 separation crossings rejected; positive official control allowed; all 3 triggers present).

known_issues_or_risks: R1: full DNS-rebinding TOCTOU IP pinning is not implemented (addresses are re-resolved and re-checked per hop but not pinned across connect). Documented and accepted as out-of-scope in progress.md (S1) and current_contract.json; does not affect any F004 acceptance step.

The reference JsonOfferAdapter is a documented minimal contract demonstrator that raises on malformed input in isolation and relies on run_scan's per-document guard for isolation; the production adapters handle malformed input in-adapter. Verified non-defect: system-level behaviour never crashes and never guesses.
recommendation: Accept F004 as passing at commit 2c986a91250eccf561567342d0d33c9d85b6ee69. All four acceptance steps and cross-feature guardrails are independently and adversarially verified at the required Level 2; F004.passes set to true. Next priority feature: F005 (cloudflare-vertical-slice).
